# 8ailors

> Candidate public home surface for ZDP products and experiments.

This site is a static public preview. Treat `8ailors.xyz` as a candidate domain until `service.yaml` and `webpub.toml` mark the domain as live.

## Locale Policy

- Default locale: `en`
- Supported locales: `en`, `ko`
- Canonical content URLs are locale-prefixed.
- `/` and non-locale section paths are negotiation entries only.
- Unsupported visitor languages fall back to English.

## Core Links

- `/`: Locale negotiation entry
- `/en`: Public home and route map
- `/en/products`: Public product and experiment list
- `/en/design`: Public design-system principles
- `/en/security`: Public security and trust principles
- `/en/labs`: Public labs and experiment boundary
- `/en/roadmap`: Public roadmap boundary
- `/en/notes`: Public notes and changelog
- `/en/trust`: Trust, policy, and public-boundary notes
- `/en/contact`: Public contact path
- `/en/privacy`: Privacy policy
- `/en/terms`: Terms of service
- `/en/refunds`: Refund policy
- `/en/about`: About Rodisoft and 8ailors
- `/ko`: 공개 홈과 경로 지도
- `/ko/products`: 공개 제품 및 실험 목록
- `/ko/design`: 공개 디자인 시스템 원칙
- `/ko/security`: 공개 보안 및 신뢰 원칙
- `/ko/labs`: 공개 실험실 경계
- `/ko/roadmap`: 공개 로드맵 경계
- `/ko/notes`: 공개 기록
- `/ko/trust`: 신뢰, 정책, 공개 경계
- `/ko/contact`: 공개 문의 경로
- `/ko/privacy`: 개인정보 처리 기준
- `/ko/terms`: 이용 약관
- `/ko/refunds`: 환불 기준
- `/ko/about`: Rodisoft와 8ailors 소개

## Boundaries

- No login, payment, ledger, admin, or private user-data flow is implemented here.
- No internal architecture documents, staging URLs, customer data, or secrets should appear in this file.
- Public feeds should be static build artifacts before launch; runtime feed generation is out of scope for this repository.
